sglang.title: docs: update news
sglang.author: zhyncs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] remove post_layernorm in siglip
vllm.author: wnma3mz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
No issues have been raised at present,  but it is a known bug.

What is the bug

When siglip acts as a multimodal vision encoder, there is no need for a post layer norm, which would otherwise result in unexpected output.

What is the fix

comment post_layer_norm

Why was the original implementation

vllm.title: [MISC] Consolidate FP8 kv-cache tests
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Consolidate the tests introduced by #8013 along with other fp8 kv-cache tests.
Re-enable fp8 model tests. We now checking the logprobs of first 4 tokens instead of checking the output tokens.

cc @robertgshaw2-neuralmagic @mgoin @pavanimajety @jon-chuang

vllm.title: [MISC] Replace input token throughput with total token throughput
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I found that the input and output token throughput in the benchmark serving script is misleading, because they are calculated by the end to end latency instead of prefill or decode latency. While it's not clear how we could measure prefill or decode latency separately, this PR replaced these metrics

vllm.title: [Neuron] Adding support for adding/ overriding neuron configuration a…
vllm.author: hbikki
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
…nd adding support for neuron model quantization configuration.


Quantization : Added support for int8 quantization for the neuron models, this is achieved by passing the quant config as a param tot he neuron config, the NEURON_QUANT_DTYPE helps us customize the dtype for the quantization.


Neuron

vllm.title: [bugfix] Upgrade minimum OpenAI version
vllm.author: SolitaryThinker
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After #5649 landed, encountered follow error on openai 1.35. Installing the latest 1.43.0 resolved the issue, but we may be able to set a wider range as I don't know when the API was added.

vllm.title: [Core/Bugfix] Add query dtype as per FlashInfer API requirements.
vllm.author: elfiegg
vllm.bodyExcerpt: As per FlashInfer doc, q_data_type will be set to KV cache's data_type if not explicitly set, which results in RuntimeError: BatchPrefillWithPagedKVCachePyTorchWrapper::BeginForward(at::Tensor, at::Tensor, at::Tensor, at::Tensor, unsigned int, unsigned int, unsigned int, unsigned int, unsigned int,
